task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Booking Calendar with Conflict Detection** (Level 6)

ARCHETYPE: booking_app. Shape: a Bookings table with date + time + guest_name fields, endpoints to create and list bookings, with a GUARD that prevents double-booking (same date + time slot). The guard is the CORE differentiator — this is what makes it a booking_app, not a generic CRUD. DO NOT skip the guard. Include: POST /api/bookings (creates, guards against conflicts), GET /api/bookings (lists all). The guard s
